mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audio (audio_url, place_id, image_url, title, script, play_time) VALUES (#{audioUrl}, #{placeId}, #{imageUrl}, #{title}, #{script}, #{playTime})
mapper.select: SELECT audio_id AS audioId, audio_url AS audioUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(image_url, ''), ( SELECT first_image FROM place WHERE place_id = #{placeId} )) AS imageUrl, title, script, play_time AS playTime FROM audio WHERE place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY audio_id ASC
